      TCO Certified IT and technology products are certified based on lower environmental and climate impact, safer chemicals and circular design which reduces e-waste.       Impedance 16 Ohms

      About this item

      • Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling: 2 internal and 2 external mics work in tandem to detect external noise and effectively reduce up to 90% of it, no matter in airplanes, trains, or offices.
      • Immerse Yourself in Detailed Audio: The noise cancelling headphones have oversized 40mm dynamic drivers that produce detailed sound and thumping beats with BassUp technology for your every travel, commuting and gaming. Compatible with Hi-Res certified audio via the AUX cable for more detail.
      • 40-Hour Long Battery Life and Fast Charging: With 40 hours of battery life with ANC on and 60 hours in normal mode, you can commute in peace with your Bluetooth headphones without thinking about recharging. Fast charge for 5 mins to get an extra 4 hours of music listening for daily users.
      • Dual-Connections: Connect to two devices simultaneously with Bluetooth 5.0 and instantly switch between them. Whether you're working on your laptop, or need to take a phone call, audio from your Bluetooth headphones will automatically play from the device you need to hear from.
      • App for EQ Customization: Download the soundcore app to tailor your sound using the customizable EQ, with 22 presets, or adjust it yourself. You can also switch between 3 modes: ANC, Normal, and Transparency, and relax with white noise.
      • Hear Your Surroundings: Switch to Transparency mode on your noise cancelling headphones when you need to be aware of your surroundings, such as transportation announcements, crossing the road, or just staying connected to the world around you.
      › See more product details

      2. Control Your Ambient Sound

      Key Features

      1. Reduce Noise By Up to 90%: soundcore Q20i noise cancelling headphones use hybrid active noise cancelling technology to effectively block out sounds in real-time.
      2. Hi-Res Audio: Hi-Res audio means that you can listen to wireless music of better quality than a CD. The large 40mm drivers can also produce crisp sound with thumping bass.
      3. Ideal for Commutes and Travel: Explore more with 40 hours of playtime with ANC on and 60 hours with ANC off. And even if you're in a rush and running low on power, a 5-minute fast charge will give you 4 more hours of peaceful travel.
      4. soundcore App: Personalize your listening experience in the soundcore app with a customizable EQ, white noise for relaxation, and more.
      5. Transparency Mode: Switch to transparency mode to connect with your surroundings without taking your noise cancelling headphones off. If you want some quiet, easily toggle between noise cancelling and normal mode as well.
      6. Dual Device Connectivity: For extra convenience, connect up to two devices at the same time. The noise cancelling headphones will intelligently switch to the device that is playing audio.
      7. Long Listening Comfort: Multi-angle rotatable ear cups allow you to wear your Bluetooth headphones at any angle. Breathable mesh keeps your ears sweat-free and memory foam cushions adapt to the shape of your ears for long-lasting comfort.
      8. Hands-Free Calls: Incoming call but your hands are full? Just tap the button on your Bluetooth headphones and the built-in microphone will pick up your voice clearly for convenient conversation.

      • Note: ANC mode is not compatible with an AUX cable. According to regulations, the maximum volume of headphones should not exceed 100dB. In order to protect your hearing, Q20i's maximum volume has been set to 95dB. It is recommended that you do not listen to excessively loud volumes for long periods of time.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Review this product

      Sponsored

      Customers say

      Customers praise these headphones for their excellent noise cancellation and sound quality, with one noting the adjustable features. They are comfortable, with customers mentioning their ears don't hurt, and have amazing battery life that stays charged. Customers appreciate the Bluetooth connectivity, which pairs easily with iPhones and connects to two devices simultaneously, and find them good value for money, with one comparing them favorably to Beats headphones.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Best headphones ever! You won’t regret these bad boys!
      These Sound ore by Anker Q20i headphones are absolutely amazing. I am an earbud girlie all the way, but let’s be real, the noise cancelling effect is only in play when you’re playing music on your ears buds. In the other hand, these headphones, as soon as they just connect to any of my devices, provide the noise cancelling effect I was looking for! I wanted noise cancelling headphones to block out the noise of home - I have 3 kids that always have some sort of device and my fiancé who ALWAYS has the tv on and loud. I love that I can pop these on if if I’m not playing anything through them at the moment. - I also love the fact that they can be connected/paired to multiple devices. They are currently paired to my phone, iPad, and switch lite. I use these a lot to play music through my phone or while gaming on my switch lite. BONUS- you can simultaneously have these connected to 2 devices at once. Using them while gaming but also connected to my phone so I won’t miss an important phone call. The headphones do have specific sides R/L that are marked accordingly. If you out them on backwards, they still work BUT if you are trying to use the mic, it will drastically impact the ability for the other person to hear you- so just make sure you put them on the right way. - most headphones are EXTREMELY big on my head as I do have a smaller head- others would fall off the back of my head if I tilted it backwards or fly off the front when I sat up. These do not do that! Do they move some? Yes, but they are by far the best fitting headphones I have ever tried. -also, I have never been able to wear headphones around my neck because they always make me feel like I’m choking, these however don’t and are the first ones I have ever been able to wear around my neck when needing to pause use for a time. - The ear pads/pillows are SO comfortable, they literally feel like little pillow clouds on my ears. They are comfortable enough to lay down with while wearing and I mean laying on my side too. - the sound is incredible, the volume control is top notch! You can turn the volume up all the way if you like, but it’s really not necessary, and I have hearing loss on both sides. (See screenshot showing my perfect volume level with these) - There is an app you can download and adjust your equalizer to personalize it. I just use the Bass booster setting. - the battery life is amazing- far superior to my earbuds. I have only charged them once since I bought them yet and I have had them for nearly 2 weeks now. - these are actually my second pair as the first ones the band seemed as though it had been stretched out and had a pin hole in the ear pad. They replaced them super quick without issue. - they are very durable as previously stated with me sleeping on them. Initially I just tossed them into my bag, but I wanted to protect my investment (I normally don’t really spend money on myself) so I was even able to get a case for these! - oh, I almost forgot! I love how you can fold these too for storage! Makes it super nice for sure! If you’re in doubt, take the jump- I promise you won’t regret your purchase with these!
      MoreHide

      Top reviews from the United States

      • Soulshine75
        5.0 out of 5 stars Just get them!!!! Favorite Headphones I've Ever Purchased!
        Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
        Color: Almond WhiteVerified Purchase
        Just get them! These headphones are FANTASTIC! 🎧
        -Sound: 🔉📢 I got them mostly to listen to music, podcasts and audio books and the sound quality is amazing, especially listening to hard rock.
        🎸🥁🎤🎼
        Vocals and instruments are crisp, clear and clean and the bass hits juuuussst rigghhhhht! 🔊🔉
        I didn't hear any distortion at all unless it was in the actual music I was listening to and you can make adjustments on the app if needed. The headphones comes with the Soundcore app that's simple and user friendly and allows you to connect your device. You can also adjust the Equalizer to the settings you like. Are you all about that bass? More Treble? No problem! There are also several pre-selected categories to choose from as well to suit your tastes. I like my music loud and these headphones deliver!

        -Battery life is great. They came fully charged and I've used them for 3 days now and have not had to charge them yet.

        -Bluetooth connection was quick and easy. I haven't had any issues thus far losing connection and I walked about 60 feet and still held connection.
        -Very comfortable on the ears even after wearing them for a few hours at a time. Included is an aux cord you can use from device to headphones as well.

        -Noise cancelling: Also impressed! I'd say it cancels about 90-95% of outside noise and there is a simple button on the side to turn on and off along with your power button and a volume up and down. Headphones are labeled L and R on the inside and easy to see. I was wearing them during a thunderstorm and I didn't even hear the thunder or rain until I took them off which was pretty cool!!!! It's wild seeing the rain but not hearing it. I'd say that's pretty decent NC.

        After trying several budget friendly headphones, I'm finally happy and I'd most definitely purchase this brand again. Fantastic Headphones for the price! I am super happy with this purchase and I think you will be too! 🎧

      • Sean Bozarth
        5.0 out of 5 stars Comfortable headphones with impressive noise cancelling
        Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
        Color: BlackVerified Purchase
        These headphones have been a really nice upgrade for listening to music or podcasts. The hybrid active noise cancelling does a good job reducing background noise, which makes them great for travel, work, or just relaxing at home.

        The sound quality is clear with solid bass, and the Bluetooth connection has been stable. Pairing them with a phone or tablet was quick and easy.

        They’re also very comfortable to wear for longer periods, thanks to the soft ear cushions and adjustable headband. Battery life has been excellent as well, lasting for many hours between charges.

        Overall, these headphones offer great sound, useful noise cancelling, and good comfort at a very reasonable price. 🎧

      • Brian C Tribbett
        5.0 out of 5 stars Fantastic Customer Service & Product!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026
        Color: Almond WhiteVerified Purchase
        I’m a big fan of Soundcore and have been for a long time. I’ve owned several models of headphones and earbuds. I’m also a fan of their Anker line of products.

        The quality is great and the customer service is even better. My first pair had an issue with an odd, unexplainable, sound that would come out of nowhere. It would hurt my ears and scare me because it was unexpected. I contacted the company directly through their website. I explained the issue and offered to send them back for testing. They agreed and sent me return postage. I sent them back and then they sent me a new pair.

        Product Review
        These headphones are fantastic! I purchased a pair for the noise cancellation feature and the ability to connect to 2 devices at the same time. Connecting to multiple devices, an switching back and forth, was seamless.

        ANC
        I connect to my work laptop and my phone at the same time and the switch over is seamless. The noise cancellation is good. You can still hear a little but I’d say these block 95% of sound.

        Fit
        They fit great on my ears and the padded headband feels good on my bald head. They are very comfortable overall.

        Sound
        Excellent sound with very low latency. You can customize the EQ through the Soundcore app (which the app has tons of other features). Taking phone calls are clear for both parties.

        This is an unsolicited review. My experience with their multitude of products, and excellent customer service, has been nothing but the very best.
        Read more

      • Britincali
        4.0 out of 5 stars Good sound quality, good noise cancelling
        Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026
        Color: BlackVerified Purchase
        I've listened to lots of high end headphones as I used to work in ProAudio electronics. These are obviously not competing with $$$ headphones and it's important to point out that comparissons should be fair.

        I needed a set of bluetooth headphones for use at work and on planes. These got good reviews on youtube.

        These headphones are remarkably good and very good for the $.
        They have an app that can be used to shape the EQ to your tastes. I raised bass and treble a little. There is plenty of bass available and they are clear in the midrange.

        They are easy to connect and there are easy buttons for control on the side. They seem pretty rugged and fold up into a nice small shape. Battery life seems very good.

        The noise cancelling is amazing. Sitting in a noisy environment just hit the switch (on the headphones) and it's as quiet as the womb. I am looking forward to taking these on a plane.

        The one and only downside is they are hot to wear for an extended time. After an hour I am relieved to get them off. However I guess a lot of full headphones are the same so it's not purely an issue with these.

      • C. Spencer
        5.0 out of 5 stars Good Sound, Great Value, Better Than Advertised
        Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026
        Color: BlueVerified Purchase
        I used these headphones on two very long flights. At first, I thought they were decent but not great. Apparently, I hadn't turned on noise cancelling. When I did, there was a second or so delay, then it kicked in. The change was drastic. Outside sounds dropped to almost nothing.
        The bass response is very good, even without using the equalizer in the app. Sound volume- almost too good. They will play at a high volume.
        These are not audiophile headphones- those cost from 4 times more up to however much money you've got. I consider them an excellent value.
        A few more things- they are lightweight, very adjustable, comfortable for long periods. They connect easily with Bluetooth. They stay in place at the gym.

      • Zac Brown
        5.0 out of 5 stars Great value
        Reviewed in Australia on January 11, 2026
        Color: BlueVerified Purchase
        Definitely 5 stars for the price.

        I am got these to replace my Sony MDR 1000x (basically the old version of the XM4). Which were 5 X more expensive than these.

        I beat of my headphones, running, using them for the gym, lots of travel and being thrown into bags. So I decided to go for a cheaper option this time. Although my Sony's lasted almost 10 years I had to keep repairing them myself to keep them going.

        So here's my comparison against a pretty premium pair of headphones- my wife also has Bose QC35's and I've used them plenty too.

        Pros:

        - Sound Isolation is amazing, it has a very good seal over the ears (I have a big head and ears too)
        - Very comfortable, and suprisingly light. Ear cups feel memory foamish
        - noise cancelling is pretty great, and it doesn't cause discomfort like some cheap NC
        - Bass is powerful if you like that
        - they look good and feel of reasonable quality
        - the battery is as advertised

        Cons:
        - Sound quality over all is not spectacular, but good for the price. The bass is good but the mids and highs are a bit muddy. Honestly though it's completely fine and probably the best sound you'll get around this price.
        - Turning on the Noise cancelling causes a noticeable dip in sound quality. Although the NC is very impressive, it definitely causes the sound quality to become a bit more tinny. While the bass is still there. Everything else gets washed out. I find myself needing to change EQ settings when I turn NC On and Off. For this reason I have been using them with NC off mostly ( a bit annoying too as it defaults to being on everytime)

        So if you're tossing up between getting these or breaking the bank. Just know the main thing you'll sacrifice is sound quality. The NC is good, the soundcore app is nice enough, they look good and even sound decent enough. I'm perfectly happy to use these instead of more expensive headphones.
        Read more

      Product Summary: Soundcore by Anker Q20i Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth, 40H Long ANC Playtime, Hi-Res Audio, Big Bass, Customize via an App, Transparency Mode (White)

      From Soundcore

      4.6 out of 5 stars, 57,580 ratings

      Customer reviews

      10K+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: THB 1,481.21 36% Savings

      List Price: THB 2,304.28

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling: 2 internal and 2 external mics work in tandem to detect external noise and effectively reduce up to 90% of it, no matter in airplanes, trains, or offices.
      • Immerse Yourself in Detailed Audio: The noise cancelling headphones have oversized 40mm dynamic drivers that produce detailed sound and thumping beats with BassUp technology for your every travel, commuting and gaming. Compatible with Hi-Res certified audio via the AUX cable for more detail.
      • 40-Hour Long Battery Life and Fast Charging: With 40 hours of battery life with ANC on and 60 hours in normal mode, you can commute in peace with your Bluetooth headphones without thinking about recharging. Fast charge for 5 mins to get an extra 4 hours of music listening for daily users.
      • Dual-Connections: Connect to two devices simultaneously with Bluetooth 5.0 and instantly switch between them. Whether you're working on your laptop, or need to take a phone call, audio from your Bluetooth headphones will automatically play from the device you need to hear from.
      • App for EQ Customization: Download the soundcore app to tailor your sound using the customizable EQ, with 22 presets, or adjust it yourself. You can also switch between 3 modes: ANC, Normal, and Transparency, and relax with white noise.
      • Hear Your Surroundings: Switch to Transparency mode on your noise cancelling headphones when you need to be aware of your surroundings, such as transportation announcements, crossing the road, or just staying connected to the world around you.

      Product Description

      /

      Newer Version Available

      Soundcore Space One Pro, FlexiCurve Over-Ear Headphone, Adaptive Active Noise Cancelling Headphones Driven by 6 Mics, 60H Lossless Audio, Ultra-Fast Charging, Hi-Res Wireless, Comfortable Fit
